description: The five logarithmic fit points are all empirical (N=10^6, 10^9, 10^10, 10^11, 10^12); forecasted values (like N=10^15) are extrapolations. The report should make this distinction explicit.
action_taken: The five logarithmic fit points are all empirical (N=10^6, 10^9, 10^10, 10^11, 10^12); forecasted values (like N=10^15) are extrapolations. The report should make this distinction explicit.
